seoTitle: Connect Canva to Google Docs and Embed Designs
metaDescription: Install the Canva add-on for Google Docs, browse your designs from the sidebar, and embed graphics that update automatically when edited in Canva.
intro: Rather than exporting and re-uploading images every time you tweak a design, you can connect Canva directly to Google Docs. This guide covers installing the integration, browsing your Canva assets from inside a document, and keeping embedded graphics in sync.

steps.heading: Find the Canva add-on in the Marketplace
steps.body: Open the Extensions tab in Google Docs and search the Google Workspace Marketplace for the official Canva integration.

steps.heading: Install and authenticate
steps.body: Install the add-on, then activate the Canva sidebar inside Docs and sign in with your Canva account.

steps.heading: Browse your designs from the sidebar
steps.body: Access your personal folders, team folders, and saved assets directly from the sidebar panel without leaving your document.

steps.heading: Embed a design into your document
steps.body: Select a graphic, presentation, or banner and embed it into your text with proper dimensions and alignment.

steps.heading: Sync updates from Canva
steps.body: Use the update gateway to push any changes you make in Canva straight into your open Google Doc.

faq.question: Do I need a Canva account to use this integration?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to authenticate with your Canva account credentials after installing the add-on.

faq.question: Will edits in Canva automatically update my Google Doc?
faq.answer: Yes, the live sync utility lets you refresh embedded designs so edited graphics update inside your document.

faq.question: Where do I find the Canva add-on?
faq.answer: It's available through the Google Workspace Marketplace, accessible from the Extensions tab in Google Docs.

faq.question: Can my team use the same shared Canva assets?
faq.answer: Yes, you can browse shared team folders from the sidebar, as long as your Canva permissions allow access.
